item.title: 360 ONE WAM Ltd Gains 1.27%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: 360 ONE WAM Ltd closed the week ending 20 March 2026 with a modest gain of 1.27%, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock showed resilience amid mixed market conditions, buoyed by strong quarterly results and long-term fundamentals, but faced technical headwinds including a bearish Death Cross formation and a downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s performance during the week and their implications for investors. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: IIFL Capital Services Ltd Falls 4.64%: 2 Key Technical Signals Drive the Week
item.description: IIFL Capital Services Ltd experienced a challenging week, closing at Rs.270.05 on 20 Mar 2026, down 4.64% from the previous Friday's close of Rs.283.20. This decline notably outpaced the Sensex's modest 0.28% fall over the same period, reflecting growing bearish momentum amid significant technical developments including a shift in momentum and the formation of a Death Cross. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Ltd Drops 9.09%: Key Financial Strains and Market Pressures
item.description: Vishwaraj Sugar Industries Ltd’s stock endured a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, declining 9.09% to close at Rs.4.90, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell a marginal 0.28% over the same period. The stock hit a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.4.91 on 16 March, reflecting persistent financial pressures and bearish technical signals amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: CSB Bank Ltd Gains 8.82%: 7 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Surge
item.description: CSB Bank Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 8.82% from Rs.332.05 to Rs.361.35 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex, which declined 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by notable intraday highs, technical momentum shifts, and valuation upgrades, reflecting a complex but cautiously optimistic outlook for this small-cap private sector bank. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Assam Entrade Gains 3.83%: Valuation Shifts and Downgrade Shape Weekly Moves
item.description: Assam Entrade Ltd delivered a mixed week, closing with a 3.83% gain to Rs.921.00, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock experienced notable volatility, driven by a valuation reclassification to very expensive and a subsequent downgrade to Sell amid mixed technical signals and modest profitability metrics. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: DJ Mediaprint & Logistics Ltd Falls 2.81%: Key Events and Valuation Shift This Week
item.description: DJ Mediaprint & Logistics Ltd experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its stock price declining by 2.81% to close at Rs.81.95, underperforming the Sensex which fell 0.28%. The week was marked by a sharp sell-off midweek that triggered a lower circuit, followed by a valuation reassessment signalling a shift from expensive to fair. Despite some recovery attempts, the stock remained under pressure amid sector headwinds and cautious investor sentiment. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Rossari Biotech Declines 8.07% This Week: 7 Key Factors Behind the Downtrend
item.description: Rossari Biotech Ltd’s stock endured a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, falling 8.07% to close at Rs.410.00, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s marginal decline of 0.28%. The stock hit multiple 52-week and all-time lows amid persistent bearish technical signals, subdued financial metrics, and sector headwinds, reflecting a sustained downtrend in the specialty chemicals segment. Time: 1 minute ago

item.title: Max Healthcare Declines 2.55%: Technical Weakness and Sector Pressure Weigh
item.description: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd’s shares fell by 2.55% over the week ending 20 Mar 2026, closing at ₹964.75 from ₹990.00 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the broader Sensex, which declined by a milder 0.28% during the same period. The stock faced persistent technical headwinds and sectoral pressures, culminating in a volatile week marked by sharp intraday moves and a notable intraday low on 19 Mar 2026. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Happiest Minds Technologies Gains 4.38%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Volatility
item.description: Happiest Minds Technologies Ltd experienced a volatile week from 16 to 20 March 2026, closing with a 4.38% gain to Rs.411.35, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28%. The week was marked by a sharp initial decline, a technical downgrade to Sell, followed by a strong rebound on exceptional volume and trading activity, reflecting mixed market sentiment amid cautious optimism. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Route Mobile Ltd Gains 2.23%: Key Events and Market Dynamics from 16-20 March 2026
item.description: Route Mobile Ltd’s stock experienced a volatile week from 16 to 20 March 2026, ultimately gaining 2.23% to close at Rs.470.85, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp rebound following a prolonged downtrend that saw the stock hit fresh 52-week and all-time lows, reflecting a complex interplay of technical pressures, financial results, and market sentiment within the telecom services sector. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Chemcon Speciality Chemicals Ltd Falls 2.40%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Decline
item.description: Chemcon Speciality Chemicals Ltd’s stock declined by 2.40% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.146.50 compared to Rs.150.10 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s marginal 0.28% fall, reflecting company-specific challenges amid a broadly cautious market. The stock hit fresh 52-week and all-time lows during the week, pressured by deteriorating financial metrics, bearish technical signals, and limited institutional interest. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Advait Energy Transitions Gains 9.07%: Valuation Shift and Intraday Surge Drive Momentum
item.description: Advait Energy Transitions Limited delivered a strong weekly performance, gaining 9.07% from Rs.1,508.55 to Rs.1,645.45 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock’s rally was driven by a notable valuation reassessment on 19 March and a robust intraday surge on 20 March, reflecting renewed investor interest amid solid operational metrics and technical momentum. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Angel One Ltd Gains 6.85%: 2 Key Drivers Behind the Weekly Rally
item.description: Angel One Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 6.85% from Rs.216.20 to Rs.231.00 between 16 and 20 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp intraday surge on 18 March, accompanied by a notable increase in derivatives open interest, signalling heightened market activity and investor interest despite a cautious technical backdrop. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd’s Mixed Week: -0.20% Price Change Amid Volatile Market
item.description: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd closed the week marginally lower by 0.20% at Rs.2,323.75, slightly outperforming the Sensex which declined 0.28%. The stock exhibited notable intraday volatility, hitting an intraday high of Rs.2,439 on 18 March before succumbing to selling pressure amid broader market weakness on 19 March. Mixed technical signals and sectoral headwinds shaped the week’s price action, reflecting a cautious market environment for this large-cap Aerospace & Defense player. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Gains 1.08%: Mixed Technical and Valuation Signals Shape the Week
item.description: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 1.08%, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock exhibited notable volatility, with a sharp intraday rally midweek followed by a mixed technical and valuation outlook that shaped investor sentiment. Key developments included a significant technical momentum shift and a valuation reassessment that downgraded the stock’s attractiveness, influencing price movements throughout the week. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Gland Pharma's Technical Turbulence: 3.71% Weekly Decline Amid Mixed Signals
item.description: Gland Pharma Ltd closed the week ending 20 March 2026 marginally lower by 0.16%, settling at Rs.1,625.20, slightly outperforming the Sensex which declined 0.28% over the same period. The week was marked by significant technical fluctuations, rating changes by MarketsMOJO, and mixed financial signals that influenced the stock’s price trajectory amid broader market volatility. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Ravinder Heights Ltd Falls 3.17%: 3 Key Factors Behind the Weekly Decline
item.description: Ravinder Heights Ltd’s stock declined by 3.17% over the week ending 20 March 2026, closing at Rs.35.75 compared to Rs.36.92 the previous Friday. This underperformance contrasted with the Sensex’s marginal fall of 0.28%, reflecting persistent sectoral and company-specific challenges. The week saw the stock hit fresh 52-week lows amid valuation shifts, technical weakness, and subdued market sentiment despite some operational growth. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Mrs Bectors Food Specialities Ltd Gains 1.30%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Mrs Bectors Food Specialities Ltd closed the week ending 20 Mar 2026 with a modest gain of 1.30%, outperforming the Sensex which declined by 0.28% over the same period. The stock showed resilience after hitting a 52-week low on 16 Mar, followed by a notable shift in valuation attractiveness on 17 Mar, which helped stabilise prices despite broader market volatility and sector challenges. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Fairchem Organics Ltd Falls 6.69%: Four Key Factors Driving the Decline
item.description: Fairchem Organics Ltd’s stock declined by 6.69% over the week ending 20 March 2026, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 0.28%. The stock hit multiple 52-week and all-time lows amid persistent financial challenges and bearish technical signals, reflecting ongoing pressures in the specialty chemicals sector. item.title: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd Drops 2.57%: 2 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Ltd (IRFC) experienced a challenging week from 16 to 20 March 2026, with its share price declining by 2.57% to close at Rs.94.70, underperforming the Sensex which fell 0.28% over the same period. The stock hit a fresh 52-week low early in the week and faced renewed selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sectoral headwinds, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment despite the company’s steady profitability metrics. Time: 3 minutes ago
